description_long: This is a teal-colored disposable coffee cup with a white plastic lid, commonly used for takeaway beverages in urban environments. The front of the cup features a decorative scalloped border with the words 'FARM GIRL' in stylized, light-colored text. The back of the cup lists several London neighborhoods, a website, and a recycling reminder, all in white text. The cup's body appears to be made of coated paper or cardboard, while the lid is molded plastic with a sipping slot and a small vent hole. The surface of the cup is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible handle. The overall design is modern and branded, suitable for cafes or coffee shops.
description: A teal disposable coffee cup with a white plastic lid, featuring 'FARM GIRL' branding and London neighborhood listings. The cup is smooth, slightly glossy, and designed for takeaway beverages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARM GIRL' logo in a decorative frame on the teal cup body with a white lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth teal surface and the white plastic lid with a sipping slot visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying white text listing London neighborhoods, a website, and a recycling message on the teal background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain teal surface and the white lid, with the logo partially visible at the edge.
